Repository usage note:
- this file is included as a reference for upstream data lineage associated
  with wordfreq-derived frequency resources
- CC BY-SA 4.0 is not the license of the eitango application code
- redistributors of derived data should review the canonical legal code above
  and keep attribution / share-alike obligations in mind
